# Dashboard Checklist: Kalshi Quant Dashboard

**Purpose**: Review the dashboard specification for completeness, clarity, consistency, and operational readiness before planning or implementation.
**Created**: 2026-04-11
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist was generated by `/speckit.checklist` and reviewed against the current spec, plan, contracts, and task set on 2026-04-11 before implementation.

## Requirement Completeness

- [X] CHK001 Are the canonical lifecycle stage values explicitly enumerated so cross-system mapping can be reviewed objectively? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §FR-021b]
- [X] CHK002 Are required fields defined for each canonical event family rather than only listing the family names? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §Contracts & Boundaries; Spec §FR-003b]
- [X] CHK003 Are the relationships and cardinalities between decisions, trade lifecycle records, fills, skips, positions, PnL snapshots, alerts, and audit entries documented? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §Key Entities]
- [X] CHK004 Are export schemas or minimum exported columns defined for decisions, trades, skips, PnL, and alerts? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §FR-019b]
- [X] CHK005 Are per-role permissions mapped to concrete surfaces and actions such as raw payload viewing, CSV export, incident actions, and administrative controls? [Completeness, Spec §Security & Access Model; Spec §FR-002a]
- [X] CHK006 Are incident-management actions and incident state transitions specified, or intentionally declared out of scope? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §FR-018]
- [X] CHK007 Are health-check types, surfaced statuses, and monitored components defined concretely enough to review pipeline coverage? [Completeness, Spec §OP-002; Spec §FR-017; Spec §FR-018]
- [X] CHK008 Are onboarding requirements defined beyond repo naming and contract mapping so a new strategy can be admitted consistently? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §FR-003a; Spec §SC-005]
- [X] CHK009 Are authentication and session-lifecycle requirements defined for long-lived monitoring screens, including expiry or re-auth behavior? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §FR-001; Spec §UX-003]

## Requirement Clarity

- [X] CHK010 Is "configuration and contract mapping alone" precise enough to verify without relying on planning assumptions? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §SC-005]
- [X] CHK011 Are "current query" and "authorized rows" in the export requirements precise about whether hidden fields, derived fields, and joined metadata are included? [Clarity, Spec §FR-019b]
- [X] CHK012 Are pause and resume requirements explicit about backlog catch-up behavior, ordering guarantees, and duplicate suppression? [Clarity, Spec §FR-019d; Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK013 Are custom-range date boundaries, inclusivity rules, and timestamp precision defined for realized and unrealized PnL queries? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-014g]
- [X] CHK014 Are freshness or staleness windows quantified for PnL, heartbeats, consumers, reconnect degradation, and ingest health? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-014f; Spec §FR-018a; Spec §UX-003]
- [X] CHK015 Is the searchable field set explicitly defined for "supported identifiers and reason fields" on decisions and trades pages? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011a; Spec §FR-012a]
- [X] CHK016 Is compare-mode capacity bounded so "multiple strategies" is testable in terms of maximum selections or overflow handling? [Clarity, Gap, Spec §FR-015a; Spec §SC-004]
- [X] CHK017 Is "workable on tablet-width screens" translated into explicit viewport or breakpoint expectations? [Clarity, Ambiguity, Spec §FR-025]

## Requirement Consistency & Acceptance Quality

- [X] CHK018 Do the landing-view priorities in User Story 1 align with the first-viewport requirements in `FR-009a` without conflicting interpretations? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1; Spec §FR-009a]
- [X] CHK019 Are drawer and full-page detail requirements consistent across decisions, trades, alerts, deep links, and preserved query state? [Consistency, Spec §FR-019c; Spec §FR-019e; Spec §UX-005]
- [X] CHK020 Do "exact raw facts", "normalized derived states", and "never invent state" together define which derived states are allowed and which are prohibited? [Consistency, Ambiguity, Spec §Live/Historical Parity & Integrity; Spec §FR-021]
- [X] CHK021 Are role permissions, export behavior, audit logging, and unauthorized deep-link handling specified without hidden conflicts? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002a; Spec §FR-002b; Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK022 Can the under-60-second operator outcome be objectively measured from the landing workflow as currently written? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001; Spec §FR-009a]
- [X] CHK023 Is the "no front-end rewrite" extensibility outcome backed by explicit criteria for partially mapped or newly added event families? [Acceptance Criteria, Gap, Spec §SC-005; Spec §FR-003b; Spec §FR-003d]

## Scenario & Edge Case Coverage

- [X] CHK024 Are requirements defined for partially onboarded strategies that emit some canonical families before others are available? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-003d; Spec §FR-024b]
- [X] CHK025 Are alternate-flow requirements defined for changing timezone, filters, or compare mode while feeds are paused or reconnecting? [Coverage, Spec §FR-019c; Spec §FR-019d; Spec §UX-003; Spec §UX-004]
- [X] CHK026 Are recovery requirements defined for replay or backfill after ingest outages, not just deduplication during steady-state processing? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-003c; Spec §FR-019a]
- [X] CHK027 Are requirements defined for alert recovery, clearing, or resolution once the underlying signal returns to healthy? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-018]
- [X] CHK028 Are permission-limited scenarios covered for aggregate views, compare mode, and exported results, not only direct deep links? [Coverage, Gap, Spec §FR-002; Spec §Edge Cases]

## Operational & Dependency Coverage

- [X] CHK029 Are large-result handling requirements quantified for pagination defaults, maximum query windows, and export behavior under heavy result sets? [Non-Functional, Gap, Spec §PF-001; Spec §PF-004; Spec §FR-019b]
- [X] CHK030 Are observability requirements traceable from ingest, normalization, alert evaluation, and operator queries to specific mandatory logs, metrics, and traces? [Traceability, Spec §OP-001; Spec §OP-003]
- [X] CHK031 Are failure-mode expectations documented for publisher, executor, RabbitMQ, Kalshi, and other external dependencies beyond general availability assumptions? [Dependency, Gap, Spec §Boundary Inventory; Spec §Assumptions]
- [X] CHK032 Are documentation deliverables specific enough to review what each local setup doc, schema doc, runbook, and troubleshooting guide must contain? [Completeness, Gap, Spec §TD-005]

## Notes

- Use this checklist during spec review before `/speckit.plan`.
- This checklist supplements, rather than replaces, the existing high-level `requirements.md` checklist.
